title: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod: Programmer Art Fix
description: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod in Minecraft's Original Artstyle.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d67748b1e3f5759cda8c859cf856d8800384485.png)
## This is a Resource Pack for Crackers Wither Storm Mod that changes its textures to match with their Programmer Art Counterparts.

**Note: This pack dosent change the textures to resemble the 1.16 CWSM textures or porting Story mode's textures to CWSM, it is instead meant to adapt CWSM's current artstyle into the original pre-1.14 artstyle.**

### [**CurseForge Page**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cwsm-programmer-art-fix)

### [**Official Bedrock Port**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/cwsbp-fixed-classic-textures)

### [**An old Fanmade Bedrock Port by ChickenCrafty**](https://modbay.org/textures/2625-cwsmbp-classic-texture-pack.html)

# **Requirements**:

### [![CWSM Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dce9aa3165a364b9a705bb4d9bde26168f3fc2f.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod)

### [![PA Fix Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1e9d9214388f69fc7baebf8d198e1d9b739e8ba.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-fix)

# **Credits**:

### THGABS: Programmer Art Fix Resource Pack

### Mojang: Programmer Art Textures

### nonamecrackers2: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod

### Nazaru: CWSM's Textures

### VillagerN4: Sickened Reuben/Pig Texture (1.3+) and Fresh Wither Storm

### FreshLX: Fresh Animations

### De4dTainted: Totally Accurate Wither Storm+ Extras
